resources.name: Versafic Backend API
resources.description: Backend collection for auth, setup, billing, AI, voice, business, calls, and Twilio webhook testing.

resources.name: Register
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.accessToken) { insomnia.environment.set('access_token', body.data.accessToken); } if (body && body.data && body.data.refreshToken) { insomnia.environment.set('refresh_token', body.data.refreshToken); }

resources.name: Login
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.accessToken) { insomnia.environment.set('access_token', body.data.accessToken); } if (body && body.data && body.data.refreshToken) { insomnia.environment.set('refresh_token', body.data.refreshToken); }

resources.name: Refresh Token
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.accessToken) { insomnia.environment.set('access_token', body.data.accessToken); } if (body && body.data && body.data.refreshToken) { insomnia.environment.set('refresh_token', body.data.refreshToken); }

resources.name: Create Plan Order
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.order_id) { insomnia.environment.set('order_id', body.data.order_id); }

resources.name: Create Custom Order 10 Credits
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.order_id) { insomnia.environment.set('order_id', body.data.order_id); }

resources.name: Create Custom Order 20 Credits
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.order_id) { insomnia.environment.set('order_id', body.data.order_id); }

resources.name: Create Custom Order 30 Credits
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.order_id) { insomnia.environment.set('order_id', body.data.order_id); }

resources.name: Trigger Autopay
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.checkout && body.data.checkout.order_id) { insomnia.environment.set('order_id', body.data.checkout.order_id); }

resources.name: Start Session
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.sessionId) { insomnia.environment.set('session_id', body.data.sessionId); }

resources.name: Onboard Business
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.id) { insomnia.environment.set('business_id', body.data.id); }

resources.name: Trigger Outbound Call
resources.afterResponseScript: let body = {}; try { body = JSON.parse(await insomnia.response.text()); } catch {} if (body && body.data && body.data.callSid) { insomnia.environment.set('call_sid', body.data.callSid); }

resources.name: 01 Refresh Token
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Refresh token completed, was empty, or hit the known auth rate limit', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 401, 429]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.data.accessToken).to.be.a('string'); } if (status === 429) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } }); if (body && body.data && body.data.accessToken) { insomnia.environment.set('access_token', body.data.accessToken); } if (body && body.data && body.data.refreshToken) { insomnia.environment.set('refresh_token', body.data.refreshToken); }

resources.name: 02 Login
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Login returned fresh tokens', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data.accessToken).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.data.refreshToken).to.be.a('string'); }); if (body && body.data && body.data.accessToken) { insomnia.environment.set('access_token', body.data.accessToken); } if (body && body.data && body.data.refreshToken) { insomnia.environment.set('refresh_token', body.data.refreshToken); }

resources.name: 03 Get Current User
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Current user profile loaded or hit the known auth rate limit', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 429]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('success'); insomnia.expect(body.data.email).to.be.a('string'); } if (status === 429) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 04 Update Call Preferences
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Call preferences update finished, conflicted, or hit the known auth rate limit', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 409, 429]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.data.call_consent).to.eql(true); insomnia.expect(body.data.call_opt_out).to.eql(false); } if (status === 409 || status === 429) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 05 Save Business Profile
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Business profile saved', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(201); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('success'); insomnia.expect(body.data).to.be.an('object'); });

resources.name: 06 Get Setup Status
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Setup status loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('success'); insomnia.expect(body.data).to.be.an('object'); });

resources.name: 07 Get Plans
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Billing plans are available', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data.plans).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

resources.name: 08 Get Wallet
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Wallet loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data.balance_credits).to.be.a('number'); insomnia.expect(body.data.transactions).to.be.an('array'); });

resources.name: 09 Get Autopay Status
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Autopay status loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('success'); insomnia.expect(body.data).to.be.an('object'); });

resources.name: 10 Check Balance
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Balance check returns a decision', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data.has_sufficient_credits).to.be.a('boolean'); });

resources.name: 11 AI Chat
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('AI chat completed or returned the known provider-side demo limitation', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 402, 500]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.data.response).to.be.a('string'); } if (status === 402) { insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('error'); } if (status === 500) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 12 AI Chat History
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('AI chat history loaded or reported the known backend limitation', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 500]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.data.messages).to.be.an('array'); } if (status === 500) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 13 Start Session
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Customer service session starts', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(201); insomnia.expect(body.data.sessionId).to.be.a('string'); }); if (body && body.data && body.data.sessionId) { insomnia.environment.set('session_id', body.data.sessionId); }

resources.name: 14 Customer Service Chat
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Customer service chat responded or surfaced the known OpenAI credential issue', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 500]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.data.sessionId).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.data.aiResponse).to.be.a('string'); } if (status === 500) { insomnia.expect(body.message).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 15 Session History
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Customer service history loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data.sessionId).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.data.conversationHistory).to.be.an('array'); });

resources.name: 16 Voice Text To Speech
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Voice text to speech responded or surfaced the known Sarvam credential issue', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 500]); if (status === 200) { insomnia.expect(body.success).to.eql(true); insomnia.expect(body.audio).to.be.a('string'); } if (status === 400 || status === 500) { insomnia.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string'); } });

resources.name: 17 Voice Statistics
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Voice statistics load', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.success).to.eql(true); });

resources.name: 18 Onboard Business
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; let body = {}; try { body = insomnia.response.json(); } catch {} insomnia.test('Business onboarding completed or was already taken', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.be.oneOf([201, 500]); if (status === 201) { insomnia.expect(body.data.id).to.be.a('string'); } }); if (body && body.data && body.data.id) { insomnia.environment.set('business_id', body.data.id); }

resources.name: 19 List Businesses
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Businesses list loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data).to.be.an('array'); });

resources.name: 20 List Recordings
resources.afterResponseScript: const status = insomnia.response.code; const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.test('Call recordings list loads', () => { insomnia.expect(status).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.data).to.be.an('array'); });
